plugin.name: ZombieMUD_Miniwindow_Manager
plugin.author: Codex
plugin.purpose: Keeps ZombieMUD miniwindows in a stable front/back order
plugin.description:
ZombieMUD Miniwindow Manager
Plugins can register miniwindows with: CallPlugin("11e1d11e4a0d932dd870363f", "registerMiniwindow", window_id)
Useful commands: zombie windows list - list registered miniwindows zwindows - same as zombie windows list

muclient.script:
local used_numbers = {}
local function variable_name(window_id) return "z_" .. tostring(window_id) end
local function sorted_keys(t) local keys = {} for k, _ in pairs(t) do keys[#keys + 1] = k end table.sort(keys) return keys end
local function first_free_number() local n = 1 while used_numbers[n] do n = n + 1 end return n end
local function display_name(window_id) window_id = tostring(window_id or "") if string.find(window_id, "^msg_router_channels_") then return "Messages: Channels" end if string.find(window_id, "^msg_router_tells_") then return "Messages: Tells" end if string.find(window_id, "^party_bars_") then return "Party Bars" end return window_id end
local function remove_window(window_id) for n, id in pairs(used_numbers) do if id == window_id then used_numbers[n] = nil end end end
function arrangeZ() local packed = {} for _, n in ipairs(sorted_keys(used_numbers)) do packed[#packed + 1] = used_numbers[n] end
used_numbers = {} for n, window_id in ipairs(packed) do used_numbers[n] = window_id SetVariable(variable_name(window_id), tostring(n)) if WindowInfo(window_id, 1) then WindowSetZOrder(window_id, n) end end end
function registerMiniwindow(window_id) window_id = tostring(window_id or "") if window_id == "" then return end
remove_window(window_id) local wanted = tonumber(GetVariable(variable_name(window_id))) if not wanted or used_numbers[wanted] then wanted = first_free_number() end
used_numbers[wanted] = window_id arrangeZ() end
function boostMe(window_id) window_id = tostring(window_id or "") if window_id == "" then return end
remove_window(window_id) used_numbers[first_free_number()] = window_id arrangeZ() end
function dropMe(window_id) window_id = tostring(window_id or "") if window_id == "" then return end
local packed = { window_id } remove_window(window_id) for _, n in ipairs(sorted_keys(used_numbers)) do packed[#packed + 1] = used_numbers[n] end
used_numbers = {} for n, id in ipairs(packed) do used_numbers[n] = id end arrangeZ() end
function list_windows() print("") ColourNote("paleturquoise", "", "ZombieMUD miniwindows:") local count = 0 for _, n in ipairs(sorted_keys(used_numbers)) do count = count + 1 local window_id = used_numbers[n] local visible = WindowInfo(window_id, 5) and "visible" or "hidden" local label = display_name(window_id) ColourNote("khaki", "", " " .. n .. ": " .. label .. " (" .. visible .. ")") if label ~= window_id then ColourNote("dimgray", "", " id: " .. window_id) end end if count == 0 then ColourNote("yellow", "", " No miniwindows have registered yet.") end print("") end
function OnPluginInstall() used_numbers = {} BroadcastPlugin(996, "re-register z") end
function OnPluginSaveState() arrangeZ() end
function OnPluginBroadcast(msg, id, name, text) if msg == 996 and text == "re-register z" then arrangeZ() end end
function OnPluginDisable() EnablePlugin(GetPluginID(), true) ColourNote("white", "blue", "ZombieMUD Miniwindow Manager stays enabled because other visual plugins use it.") end
